verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Be Thou my vision, O Lord of my heart; Naught be all else to me, save that Thou art. Thou my best thought, by day or by night, Waking or sleeping, Thy presence my light.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Be Thou my Wisdom, Thou my true Word; I ever with Thee, and Thou with me, Lord. Thou my great Father, and I thy true son, Thou in me dwelling and I with Thee one.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Be Thou my battle-shield, sword for the fight. Be Thou my dignity, Thou my delight, Thou my soul’s shelter, Thou my high tower. Raise Thou me heav’nward, O Power of my pow'r.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Riches I heed not, nor man's empty praise; Thou mine inheritance, now and always. Thou and Thou only, first in my heart, High King of heaven, my Treasure Thou art.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: High King of heaven, after victory won, May I reach heaven’s joys, O bright heav’n’s Son! Heart of my own heart, whatever befall, Still be my vision, O ruler of all.
